action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch. Need to build a strong baseline for FMoW satellite classification with worst-region accuracy as the metric. Decision: Use CLIP ViT-L/14 (304M params) as the backbone, add a linear head for 62 classes, and fine-tune end-to-end with DistributedDataParallel across 4 GPUs and mixed precision for speed. First iteration trains only 2 epochs to validate the full pipeline (train, save, predict, eval) and measure iteration time. I will also locally test predict.py on a tiny dummy split before requesting evaluation.
action.command: torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=4 train.py --epochs 2 --batch_size 64 --lr 1e-5 --output_dir checkpoints && mkdir -p /tmp/test_dummy && head -n 20 /data/val.txt | awk '{print $1}' > /tmp/test_dummy/test.txt && ln -s /data/images /tmp/test_dummy/images && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/test_dummy --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output /tmp/test_dummy/out.json && test -s /tmp/test_dummy/out.json && echo 'predict.py OK'
